case_title: GUANG Y LIN VS. NELSON A GUTIERRREZ CASTRO ET AL

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,500.00 FILED BY LIN, GUANG Y AS TO DEFENDANT CASTRO, NELSON A GUTIERRREZ ANGELICA TEXTILE SERVICES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-17-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LIN, GUANG Y ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-17-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-17-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. 506 PLAINTIFF GUANG LIN IS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY HIS OWN NON CERTIFIED COURT CANTONESE INTERPRETER, NGAR KOK JAMES LEE. DEFENDANT NELSON GUTIERREZ CASTRO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ANGELICA TEXTILE SERVICES IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY ISAAC GOODMAN, MANAGER. NO PROOF OF SERVICE FOR DEFENDANT NELSON CASTRO. DEFENDANT NELSON CASTRO WAIVES RIGHT TO SERVICE. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-17-2018 - JUDGMENT.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LIN, GUANG Y IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CASTRO, NELSON A GUTIERRREZ ANGELICA TEXTILE SERVICES IN A NEGLIGENCE CASE, THE PLAINTIFF BEARS THE BURDEN OF PROOF. THE PARTIES HERE PRESENT CONFLICTING TESTIMONY ABOUT HOW THE ACCIDENT HAPPENED, AND THEY PRESENT NO THIRD-PARTY NEUTRAL WITNESSES. ON THIS EVIDENCE, I FIND THAT PLAINTIFF HAS NOT CARRIED HIS BURDEN. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT ANGELICA TEXTILE SERVICES
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $97.50) SERVED AUG-23-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ANGELICA TEXTILE SERVICES
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED DEC-03-2018 ORDERED DESTROYED
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF LIN, GUANG Y ADDITIONAL DEFENDANT EXHIBITS
